name: Stripe
description: Developer-first payments infrastructure for internet businesses. Provides APIs for payments, billing, and financial services.

name: Plaid
description: API platform that connects fintech applications to users' bank accounts. Enables open banking and financial data access.

name: Segment
description: Customer data infrastructure platform. Provides APIs and integrations for collecting, routing, and managing customer data.

name: Meridian Finance API

name: Stackwise Payments
description: Developer-first payment orchestration platform. Unified API for 40+ payment methods across 120 countries.

name: Vaultline
description: Enterprise-grade secrets management and compliance infrastructure for regulated industries. SOC2 certified API platform.

name: Clearframe Analytics
description: Real-time financial data infrastructure. Connects bank feeds, ERP systems, and accounting tools via a unified API.

name: Nexbridge
description: Integration platform for enterprise SaaS. Build, deploy, and monitor API integrations with visual workflow editor.

name: PlayForge Games
description: Mobile gaming studio focused on competitive multiplayer experiences. Top 50 app store rankings in 12 countries.

name: Tokenova

name: Orbis Compliance
description: Automated compliance and regulatory reporting API for banks and fintech companies. Covers AML, KYC, and GDPR obligations.

name: Relay Infrastructure
description: Cloud-native data pipeline infrastructure for enterprise teams. Kafka-compatible streaming API with 99.99% SLA.

name: SocialSphere
description: Gen-Z social networking app built around interest graphs and AI-generated content discovery.

name: Fundify
description: Embedded lending infrastructure for B2B SaaS platforms. API-first credit decisioning and loan origination for enterprise customers.

name: DataMesh Pro
description: Enterprise data mesh platform with federated governance. REST and GraphQL APIs for domain-oriented data ownership.

name: Prism Identity
description: Developer identity verification and fraud detection API. Machine learning models trained on financial transaction patterns.

name: Cloudgate Banking
description: Core banking platform for challenger banks and credit unions. Full-stack API infrastructure with embedded BaaS capabilities.

name: MemeVault
description: AI-powered meme generation and sharing platform. Viral content discovery for Gen-Z audiences.

name: Ledgerly
description: Accounting automation API for SMBs. Connects bank feeds to accounting software and automates reconciliation workflows.

name: Streamline DevOps
description: CI/CD and infrastructure automation platform for software teams. Provides APIs for build pipelines, deployment, and monitoring.

name: Quickledger
description: Real-time ledger and bookkeeping API for fintech builders. Sub-100ms transaction posting with double-entry accuracy.

name: Nexus Connect
description: Enterprise integration platform. Prebuilt connectors for 200+ SaaS tools with a unified API layer and event streaming.

name: Polygon Sports

name: TrustLayer

name: Capsule KYC

name: Airtable

name: Brex

name: Carta
